D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

V4 Hue-Selective Cells

slide the stimulus hue and watch which V4 cell, each tuned to its own colour, fires hardest

Where V1 reports cone contrast, V4 reports hue: its cells are tuned to particular colours, tiling the spectrum with overlapping bands of preference.

Each curve is one V4 cell's tuning, coloured by its preferred hue. Slide the stimulus colour and watch the marker cross the curves — the tallest crossing is the cell that signals that hue.
